detection_signals: All fortified wines are fortified after fermentation ends
Fortification always happens in the same stage for every wine
Port and Sherry are fortified at the same time in their production
why_incorrect: Fortification timing varies by wine type. In Port, spirit is added during fermentation. In Sherry, the base wine is usually fermented dry first, then fortified.
misconception: Fortified wines are always fortified after fermentation is completely finished.
corrected_understanding: Fortification timing varies by wine type and producer choice. Port is typically fortified during fermentation; Sherry after fermentation. Timing is deliberate.
